tools.name: Claude
tools.shortDescription: AI assistant built for thoughtful work — writing, analysis, coding, research, and long-document tasks across teams.
tools.bestFor: Teams that need a reliable general-purpose AI assistant with strong reasoning, long context windows, and enterprise-grade privacy controls.
tools.notes: Claude Enterprise includes SSO, admin controls, and a commitment that customer data is not used for model training. SOC 2 Type II and ISO 27001 certified.

tools.name: Claude Code
tools.shortDescription: Agentic coding tool that runs in the terminal. Handles multi-file edits, debugging, refactors, and build tasks across full codebases.
tools.bestFor: Development teams that want an AI agent embedded directly in their workflow — not just autocomplete, but autonomous multi-step coding tasks.

screenshots.alt: Claude Code running in a terminal session
Claude Code performing a multi-file edit

tools.notes: Announced February 2025 alongside Claude 3.7 Sonnet. Relatively new but already deployed at scale in enterprise environments.

tools.name: Midjourney
tools.shortDescription: AI image generation platform used for creative concepts, branding assets, marketing visuals, and rapid visual prototyping.
tools.bestFor: Creative and marketing teams that need high-quality generated imagery for concepts, campaigns, and visual exploration.

screenshots.alt: Midjourney gallery view of generated images

tools.notes: Commercial use is permitted on paid plans but subject to Midjourney's terms. Ongoing copyright litigation is worth flagging for risk-conscious organisations. Corporate billing is available for 50+ users on yearly Pro/Mega plans.

tools.name: Harvey
tools.shortDescription: AI platform purpose-built for legal and professional services — research, due diligence, contract analysis, and document review.
tools.bestFor: Law firms and in-house legal teams that need AI trained on legal workflows, not a general chatbot adapted for legal use.
tools.notes: Harvey is purpose-built for legal — not a general AI assistant with a legal plugin. Strong traction with major global law firms.
